language.description: Spanish for all user-facing content, documentation, and academic deliverables

code_language.description: English for code, variable names, comments, and API responses

testing_framework.description: pytest with FastAPI TestClient for integration tests

testing_style.description: Integration tests for endpoints (TestClient) + Unit tests for services

styling_approach.description: Tailwind CSS v4 for utilities + Forest Design System for components

deployment_method.description: Docker Compose with 3 services (backend, frontend, redis)

data_persistence.description: Supabase PostgreSQL first, local Python data as fallback

ml_prediction.description: SVM via joblib when available, keyword heuristic otherwise

academic_format.description: UNIR academic report format with 8 sections covering 5 evaluation criteria

export_formats.description: Three export formats: PDF (WeasyPrint), Jupyter notebook (nbformat), ZIP bundle

frontend_architecture.description: Angular 19 standalone components with lazy loading per route

version_control.description: Git with GitHub Actions CI (Python matrix + Node build)
